Tips for a prospective client :

· Time everything. Make sure you line up your questions and keep discussion to a minimum.
If they want to tell you stories and yap about subjects not pertaining to you or your case , make sure they do it on their dime and make sure to let them know to  keep it off your final bill. reviews.text: You guys won't believe what happened after I got T-boned by a delivery van at the intersection of SW 57th Avenue and SW 8th Street. I was turning left on a green arrow when this van ran a red light and smashed right into my driver's side! Ended up with a broken wrist and serious neck injuries that kept me from my office job near Coral Gables for almost three months. My next-door neighbor in West Miami recommended Paterson Injury Attorneys right on SW 57th Ave in 33155 - they're in that plaza near the popular bakery. When I hobbled in there in March, Alex (he's their Miami car accident lawyer) didn't overwhelm me with legal terms. He just explained everything clearly and laid out a plan for my case. The delivery company tried claiming I didn't have right of way at the 57th Avenue intersection, which is complete nonsense! These guys got traffic camera footage proving I had a green arrow, plus statements from people at the gas station who saw everything. They filed all the paperwork at Miami-Dade County Court and kept me in the loop with regular updates. Just settled for $68,500 last month, which is covering my surgery at Baptist Hospital, ongoing physical therapy, and those lost paychecks. If you're in a crash anywhere in Miami, especially around West Miami or Coral Terrace, don't waste time with those big billboard firms - these SW 57th Avenue attorneys actually understand our local roads and really fight for the people who live here.

After a devastating rear-end collision on the Dolphin Expressway near the 27th Avenue exit in Miami, I was left with severe whiplash, three herniated discs, and unable to continue my job as a hotel concierge. As a resident of Little Havana searching for a "car accident lawyer near me," I discovered Paterson Injury Attorneys on Brickell Avenue in 33131, conveniently located near Jackson Memorial Hospital where I received treatment. Their Miami personal injury law firm provided a comprehensive free consultation in March 2024, where Attorney David Paterson clearly explained Florida's no-fault insurance system and the requirements for filing a claim beyond PIP coverage. I appreciated their thorough approach—documenting every detail of my accident on this congested section of the expressway, obtaining traffic camera footage from the Florida Department of Transportation that proved the other driver was texting, and coordinating with my neurosurgical team to establish the severity of my spinal injuries. They efficiently filed my claim with the Miami-Dade County Circuit Court and negotiated persistently with the at-fault driver's insurance company when they initially offered a settlement that wouldn't even cover my medical expenses. Their expertise with similar accidents on Miami's notoriously dangerous expressways proved invaluable, as did their relationships with medical specialists familiar with spinal trauma. Within four months, they secured a $125,000 settlement that covered all my surgeries at University of Miami Hospital, extensive physical therapy, and substantial lost wages during my recovery. Their office near Brickell City Centre made follow-up appointments convenient, and their bilingual staff ensured nothing was lost in translation. As someone who commutes through Miami daily, I now recommend Paterson Injury Attorneys to everyone—they truly understand our city's traffic patterns and how to secure maximum compensation for life-altering injuries.

I had a truly terrible experience with Carlos Gomez and his law office. First and foremost, his incompetence is glaring. I made mistake after mistake, dragging my case along with errors that could have easily been avoided.

To make matters worse, he was impossible to reach, and his lack of communication left me feeling entirely in the dark throughout the investigation. When I needed guidance for depositions, he failed to prepare me adequately, only to pressure me to settle for far less than my case was worth, which I refused to accept.

It's clear that he prioritizes convenience for himself over the well-being of his clients.

But the worst part? He deliberately waited until the statute of limitations was nearly up to pressure me into a settlement offer that only benefited him. Carlos Gomez blatantly avoids going to trial because he knows he's unprepared to defend his clients in front of a jury. It's as if he only deals with small cases where clients are willing to accept any convenient settlement offer.

Moreover, Carlos Gomez and his team displayed an appalling level of rudeness and disrespect. Their incompetence is matched only by their lack of professionalism. It's abundantly clear that their primary concern is their own financial gain, not the best interests of their clients.

Do yourself a favor and stay far away from Carlos Gomez and his office. Do your research and avoid retaining these charlatans at all costs.

The office was incredibly attentive, and throughout the entire process we truly felt as though we were their only clients. The preparation of the forms was a very collaborative experience with the paralegal, and everything was completed efficiently in a short amount of time.
Before our interview, we met with our assigned lawyer, Carolina Collado who carefully explained the interview format and what we should expect. She prepared us thoroughly, and that preparation proved invaluable during the interview. Everything Carolina  told us was accurate and spot -on  and helped us feel confident in all our responses .
We chose to hire a lawyer not because we were incapable of completing the paperwork ourselves, but because this was THE most important interview of our lives. An officer’s decision regarding an adjustment of status can ultimately determine your entire future in the United States as an immigrant. Having the right legal guidance made all the difference.

I cannot say enough good things about Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes Immigration Law, and especially immigration attorney CAROLINA COLLADO along with her incredible legal assistants Melody Perkins and Claudia Fong. They are truly an invaluable immigration team.
For over 30 years of marriage, I've consulted with five or six different immigration attorneys trying to resolve my husband’s extremely complex immigration case. Every attorney gave me the same answer: “Leave it alone.” That was simply not an acceptable solution for our family. My husband is married to a U.S. citizen, a father of American children, a business owner, a taxpayer, and a contributing member of society.
Carolina Collado and the team at Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes were my last attempt before the new administration took office, and they accomplished what no other immigration lawyer had been able to do. It took time and patience, but they successfully guided us through the immigration and naturalization process with professionalism, persistence, and deep knowledge of immigration law.
TODAY, MY HUSBAND IS OFFICIALLY A UNITED STATES CITIZEN.
The peace of mind this has brought to our family is priceless. After decades of uncertainty, knowing that our family is secure and that everything we have worked our entire lives to build together is protected is truly the greatest gift we could have received.
Carolina, Melody, and Claudia are honest, hardworking, knowledgeable, and fair in their pricing. They handled a very complex immigration and citizenship case with dedication and genuine care.
If you are looking for an experienced immigration attorney who understands difficult immigration situations and the citizenship process, I highly recommend Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes Immigration Law and Carolina Collado’s team.
A true team of boss women who get results.

I cannot say enough positive things about Jimenez Mazzitelli Mordes. From the very beginning, the entire firm was professional, courteous, and exceptionally responsive. Every question I had was answered clearly and promptly, and I was kept fully informed throughout the entire process.

A very special thank you to Alexa Delgado. Alexa went above and beyond in every respect — she was not only knowledgeable and thorough, but also patient and genuinely attentive. She took the time to explain complex issues in a way that was easy to understand, and I always felt confident that my matter was being handled with care and precision.

The guy hit me going about 60 mph while I was stopped at a red light, and he basically walked away without any consequences. Instead of going after him, they just filed insurance claims. In the end, they went after my own insurance because the other driver didn’t have coverage. On top of that, it took months to finally get my check even after my insurance had already released the money. I could go into a lot more detail, but honestly after dealing with these people I’m just mentally exhausted. At this point I’d rather walk away. reviews.text:
Hands down the best at what they do. Mohad and Matthew were the attorneys that worked on my case to have my roof replaced.  As someone who worked very closely with attorneys as a law enforcement officer, I can tell you these are not your typical lawyers. Aside from the fact that they are extremely knowledgeable and well versed in laws concerning insurance claims. They just might be the most compassionate lawyers I’ve ever dealt with. During the course of our battles with the insurance company, I was experiencing family issues and was an emotional wreck. Mo and Matt became my strength and were so instrumental in keeping me focused. Needless to say these gentleman got me the outcome that was deserved with their expertise and professionalism that was on display throughout meditation and negotiations with the attorneys who represented the insurance company. If I could give this firm 10 stars I would ! They took care me and made me feel as if I was family and I don’t believe you can find that anywhere in the legal field nowadays and I certainly don’t think any other firm could have gotten me the settlement that Ariass & Abbass did !
My suggestion to anyone who has a claim against an insurance company is please use this firm you won’t regret it ! In closing I want to thank them on behalf of my children and I as our home will now be getting the repairs it desperately needed thanks to there efforts !
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback. We greatly appreciate it. We are grateful for the opportunity to represent you and winning your insurance claim.

reviews.text:
🌟 The Power of Choosing Who Surrounds You
Over time, I’ve come to realize something simple, but truly life-changing:
We have the power to choose who we allow into our lives. The success I’ve achieved and the peace I feel today are deeply rooted in surrounding myself with people who genuinely lift me up; Those who support, encourage, guide, and help me grow. These are the people who make life safer, more grounded, and far more meaningful.
⚖️ My Attorney & Friend of 40 years — Nelson Peña
Recently, after a serious vehicle accident that left me injured, I turned to Nelson and his team at The Nelson Peña Law Firm. They not only provided expert legal guidance but also genuine compassion and emotional support every step of the way. Knowing I had someone reliable, caring, and deeply committed by my side made all the difference. Nelson isn’t just my attorney; he’s a friend for life. He knows me and my family inside out. He’s the kind of person who shows up when it matters most. His entire team treats clients the same way, with respect, warmth, and care, like old friends who know exactly when to help.
My Spouse of 35 years is one of life’s greatest blessings. Sharing your journey with someone you love wholeheartedly transforms every experience. Marriage isn’t always easy, but together it’s worth every challenge, because love, patience, and partnership make life truly beautiful.
🔧 My Mechanic — My Son
If you own a car, you know how important it is to have someone dependable and honest to keep it running smoothly. When that person happens to be your son, it’s more than peace of mind, it’s pride and love rolled into one. Watching him grow into someone trustworthy and skilled is one of my greatest joys.
🩺 My Primary Care Doctor of 20 years A trusted guide on my health journey. Someone who truly knows me, my history, and my needs. In a world that moves too fast, having a doctor who listens and provides care that feels personal and genuine is a rare and grounding gift.
📊 My CPA of 20 years Not everyone finds joy in numbers, but thankfully, my CPA does! Having a wise, trustworthy advisor who helps me navigate finances, taxes, and long-term goals allows me to live with confidence and focus on what matters most.
Each of these incredible people plays a different role in my life, but they all share one thing in common: genuine care. They remind me that success and peace aren’t built alone, they’re built with the right people beside you. The ones who lift you up, stand with you, and help you grow. So today, I encourage you to take a moment to think about your circle.
Who are the people who make your life safer, brighter, and more meaningful?
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing such a thoughtful and heartfelt message. We’re truly honored to have earned your trust over the years and to have been part of your journey through this challenging time. Your kind words mean a great deal to Nelson and our entire team — we’re grateful to call you both a client and a friend.

— The Nelson Peña Law Firm

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I had the privilege of being represented by Jose Carrillo and Angel Gimenez, along with their team, after an accident I was involved in. From start to finish, they fought to ensure I received the maximum payout possible, which covered my medical bills and therapy costs related to the accident.

In the beginning, my case was handled by a different paralegal who is no longer with the team, and later Sandra took over.
The difference she made was tremendous. Sandra was not only professional but also extremely communicative and proactive—qualities that truly impacted my experience. She made sure I always understood the process, followed up with me consistently, coordinated documents, scheduled medical appointments, and kept everything on track. Even during moments when I was frustrated or overwhelmed, she was kind, patient, and reassuring, helping me stay calm and focused. Sandra is absolutely a top-tier paralegal, and the firm is lucky to have her.

At the end of the process, both attorneys showed genuine care for me as a client. They were attentive, knowledgeable, and committed to achieving the best outcome possible.

I would highly recommend Gimenez & Carrillo to anyone who needs legal support after an accident. They deliver results, and their team is dedicated to client care. My advice to future clients: be communicative and engaged throughout the process—it makes all the difference in working alongside such a professional and supportive law firm.

If you need a bulldog, someone who doesn't back down and is not afraid to go toe to toe, I would look else where. I kept saying I don't care about the cost and I got silence. It got to a point where I finally asked if they were scared to go against the other attorney and I was told maybe I should seek different counsel. Thousands of dollars and over a year, this was their recommendation. Each time I would disagree or question them, that was their response, I should seek different counsel. I wasn't ready to give up but I didn't want to start all over with a different attorney. It cost more using a lawyer than if I would have settled on my own.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are truly sorry to hear that you felt frustrated during the process. Throughout your matter, our team provided extensive legal guidance based on the specific facts of your case and the limitations of the law as it applied.
Our duty is always to give honest, realistic advice—even when the available legal options may not align with what a client wishes the outcome to be. In your situation, certain positions could not be pursued effectively because the legal framework simply did not support them. When that occurs, it is our responsibility to explain the likely results and recommend the path that would best protect you from unnecessary expense or unfavorable outcomes.
When we suggested that you may wish to consider alternative counsel, it was never out of reluctance to advocate for you. Rather, it was an effort to ensure that you felt fully supported by someone whose strategic approach aligned with your expectations.
We are glad that, despite the challenges, the process resulted in you receiving the inheritance you sought from the beginning. We remain committed to providing every client with clear, thorough, and ethically grounded legal representation. If you would ever like to discuss your experience further, we welcome the opportunity to speak with you directly.

Long review:

After a couple of month I decide it to have another case manager handle my case to see If I was able to get better assistance from them. They assigned Jennifer Mendez. After a while once again, I had to complain but this time I asked to work with the attorney, which gave me more reassurance that my case was doing fine and that everything was in place. During the closing statements which is really where you find out how much you going to be getting because again none of these people would give you any reassurance about anything not sure what kinds of lawyers are they  because if you hire a lawyer is to have reassurance otherwise I would done this myself and pocket the money I had to pay them. Anyways when I find out how much money I was going to get I range to the attorney about how I felt with her case managers (assistants) which she reply very unprofessional and this is my only complain about the attorney because she was helpful unlike the case managers (assistants) that all I got from them was bad information, lack of knowledge, etc. so I was trying to communicate that to her. She said that I was being disrespectful when the disrespect comes directly from them because the money I got is almost equal to the same amount money they got for my case. I guess she was expecting me to be happy after everything.

reviews.text:
For the last decade the Law Offices of Anthony C. Vitale have been an indispensable partner to my healthcare business - offering unrivaled counsel, guidance, and education in healthcare regulatory compliance. Their commitment to ensuring operational excellence and adherence to best practices in regulatory matters is unparalleled, setting a benchmark for excellence in the field.

A highlight of the collaboration has been the opportunity to work closely with Chris Parrela, a national leader in healthcare regulatory compliance. His adeptness at navigating the complex interplay between regulatory statutes and practical operations has been instrumental in fostering a compliant and efficient working environment. This unique capability has not only enhanced operational compliance but also set a foundation for success in dealings with third-party payers.

Moreover, Chris's proficiency in facilitating clear and transparent communication with these payers has led to mutually beneficial outcomes for all parties involved, further solidifying the firm's reputation for efficacy and efficiency in the healthcare legal landscape.

Under the guidance of Chris Parrela and the team at the Law Offices of Anthony C. Vitale, there's a palpable commitment to putting patient care at the forefront of their work. This ethos is a constant thread in their approach and a significant reason for the continued partnership. The firm's dedication to navigating the complexities of healthcare law with integrity, expertise, and a patient-first perspective is commendable, making them a highly recommended choice for anyone in the healthcare sector in need of legal services that truly understand the unique challenges and intricacies of healthcare law.

I’m writing this review out of deep frustration and disappointment with The Law Office of Jorge Cueto P.A. My experience with this firm was marked by consistent negligence, disorganization, and what I can only describe as a complete lack of accountability. What should have been a relatively straightforward process involving a vehicle repair was dragged out for months due to their mishandling of my case.

From the beginning, communication was unreliable and unprofessional. I had multiple interactions with Ana, who repeatedly failed to follow through on her promises to send critical emails, despite confirming my contact information more than once. Her time management and information retention were shockingly poor. Even after multiple detailed conversations—some just hours before key moments—she was completely unprepared when speaking to the insurance adjuster. She didn’t have the basic facts of the case, even though I had taken the time to prepare her and asked directly if she was taking notes because I had already noticed she wasn’t retaining details.

Because of their delays and lack of diligence, I ended up in a weaker position when dealing with the insurance company—forced to advocate for myself after realizing this law office had no real intention of doing so effectively. I ultimately had to seek assistance from another attorney and take matters into my own hands just to get any movement on my case.

To make matters worse, I was forced to come out of pocket to pay for parts of the vehicle repair myself, while the law office still managed to collect from the insurance settlement. It’s hard not to see that they were primarily focused on securing their cut, rather than actually representing my interests. Their cooperation with the clinic involved in my case also raised red flags—frankly, it felt shady, as if there was a pre-arranged agreement between them that prioritized their own benefit over mine.

This firm failed me at every turn. I strongly urge others to think twice before trusting them with your case. In my opinion, their lack of professionalism and dedication borders on malpractice. And honestly, seeing all these glowing reviews makes me question their authenticity—I genuinely fail to see how anyone could feel so positively about the way this firm conducts business.

I am writing to formally express my sincere appreciation for the outstanding work you provided in successfully resolving my insurance injury case. Trusted Legal Support – Time and Time Again

This is the third time I’ve turned to Michael Appel and the incredible team at Appel Law—and once again, they exceeded all expectations. Whether it’s been for an accident case or simply legal questions and guidance, Michael has always been there for me and my family with honesty, professionalism, and real care.

What sets Michael apart is not just his legal expertise, but his unwavering commitment to his clients. He has been available to us over the years for any and all legal matters—case or no case. That kind of consistent support and accessibility is rare, and something my family and I deeply appreciate.

In my most recent accident case, Michael handled everything with clarity, precision, and an incredible attention to detail. He kept me informed at every step, made sure I understood my rights, and truly fought to make sure I was treated fairly. I never felt rushed or overlooked—he gave me the time, respect, and advocacy I needed.

If you’re looking for an attorney who not only knows the law but genuinely cares about your well-being, I cannot recommend Michael Appel and Appel Law highly enough. They’ve been a trusted resource for me and my family for years, and we’re grateful to have them in our corner.

I can’t thank Attorney Mike Appel enough for the incredible support and professionalism he provided during one of the most terrifying and traumatic experiences of my life. Early on a Friday afternoon, I was picking up my son from a playdate when, out of nowhere, a huge Lexus SUV ran a stop sign and slammed into my Tesla. The crash totaled my car and left both my son and I injured, suffering from burns, trauma, and, understandably, a lot of emotional scars.

It felt like every parent’s worst nightmare come true, but thankfully, we had our health, and Attorney Appel was there to help us through it all. From the moment we reached out, he made the entire process as smooth and stress-free as possible. He took charge of all the legal aspects and ensured we received fair compensation for our injuries in a timely manner. His dedication, understanding, and commitment to our well-being made a world of difference.

Attorney Appel’s expertise and care truly alleviated so much of the stress we were already facing. I can confidently say that without his help, this difficult situation would have been even more overwhelming. If you’re in need of a personal injury attorney, I wholeheartedly recommend Mike Appel—his professionalism and genuine concern for his clients set him apart.
reviews.ownerResponse: Javier, it was our absolute pleasure to assist you and your young son throughout this unwanted ordeal. After several attempts to find an attorney, I was lucky to end with at the Law Firm of J.P. Gonzalez-Sirgo. I spoke to him about my case and could tell from the beginning that this firm was different. I got to speak directly to the attorney, and he took the time to listen to my story and reassured me “not to worry. We are going to help you. Right now the focus is to make sure you get medical treatment. Be patient. Results will not come overnight, but we will fight for you.” After this accident, I was left physically, psychologically, and financially affected. J.P. and his team treated me like a person. They didn’t treat me like a number or just another file. I could feel that I was in good hands. They are an awesome team, very knowledgeable and professional. They keep you informed step-by-step throughout the process. Thank you, Jeannie, for your kindness and patience with me.

From the very beginning, J.P. was very honest and transparent with me. Once he realized that the policy limits were not very substantial, he contacted me immediately and advised that the best option would be for him to withdraw in order to not impede on my recovery of this claim.  He made sure to be fair and ensure that I got the maximum of what I could from my claim. Even after he advised me of his withdraw, he and his team still helped me file the claim and get the process started, even though he wasn’t getting a dime.

I highly recommend JP and his team to anyone looking for an attorney. They truly take the time and effort to make you feel comfortable, understood, and put genuine care in their clients.

2023 We invited Your Insurance Attorney into our home and we regretted it ever since. We had damage to our roof and a slab leak in our kitchen. We were told we definitely had a case and they will get our home fixed. We went through the process and its been a nightmare ever since. Your Insurance Attorney called and said "Sorry your case lost". My heart dropped. How? How can this be? Buy insurance, damage happens, damage gets covered. Not so simple after all. I asked multiple times for the court documents. I had to search for myself. What i read from that judge is heartbreaking. Court dates were missed, filings were late, and proof of the damage didnt exsist. What we pay for actually does not exsist. Judge seemed frustrated and now we recieve a call asking how much we want to pay in attorneys fee for losing. Wait...what? Beyond angry, we were sickened. Now our property insurance is up for renewal by April 7th 2026. We are responsible to have all damages repaired by this date. Cost us $20,000 for a new roof. $6,000 for rerouting of our water pipes. Plus $2,700 for renewal of insurance. Thats not all. Now we have mediation on 3-10-2026. We were never informed from Cameron Lewis our attorney during mediation of our rights. We were threatened that our house will be taken from my son and forced to sell to get thier money. Also if we didnt settle the judge would force us to pay up to $30,000 maybe more because we would go to court and the fees would rack up. Not once did he tell us our home is protected by homestead and that protection goes on to my son because he is soul heir to the estate and hes lineage. Not once did he tell us that because we are both disabled and collect ssi the judge would most likely reduce the Attorney's fees not make them higher.  All is a possibility, but Cameron Lewis never mentioned this to us. NOT ONCE. He agreed with the mediator and told us we had no choice! Now we are responsible to pay another $10,000 to Citizens for attorney's fees. I also am still responsible to continue making payments for insurance i do not have. Now I email these simple questions  about not telling us our rights and I recieve an email that he is no longer our Attorney, to find someone else. Ofcourse he did. The damage is done. I should have known when they had our estimate of damages for more than what the house is worth. That was a red flag.
They settled my case, when the insurance company denied my roof claim. Thank you....
Excellent team of lawyers and 5-star service from the entire staff
Took them almost 2 years to realize they couldn't win my case, throughout that time it's like you have to keep chasing them for an up, and when you finally did, it's always nothing.
Lilianis Román 👌🏼👍🏻

Sebastian and George came out and were very professional and very friendly while the inspection was going on. They also were very nice and interacted with my two year old who just wanted to show off her toys. Would recommend

Lux Orbis Legal is the bomb!!! And Attorney Raimundo is off the chain. He really came through for us when we needed it most. Back in December, my wife and I had loss at our property that we quickly wanted to resolve. We wanted to make repairs, but our priority was to make sure the property was safe. We were clueless about what to do next and were unsure if filing a claim was the way to go. We worried about whether it was even worth it, how much of a hassle it would be, and feared the insurance company might cancel our policy or raise our rates.

We consulted Raimundo, who patiently explained the process. After getting a better understanding of the claim process, we decided to move forward with him as our attorney.

He was constantly in communication with the insurance company, bombarding them with questions and pushing them to resolve our claim. Along the way, he kept us updated, explained possible outcomes for each step, and always shared the "why" behind every action. Even with the insurance company's constant delays, he kept at it. There were moments when we were ready to throw in the towel, but Raimundo pushed us to keep fighting.

After four months, our claim was finally settled thanks to Raimundo's determination and persistence. It's clear he genuinely cares about fighting for his clients and doing what's right. We can't thank him enough for all his help!

The initial amount received from our awful insurance company was less than half of what it will actually cost to repair our house from Hurricane Ian damage.  We were at the end of our rope and nearing the deadline to file a lawsuit.  Many of our friends and acquaintances had gone the “public adjuster” route, with mixed results (Or even worse, just settled for the pittance received from their insurance co.).  After seeing a Cernitz ad online and doing a little research, we decided to give them a call.  From the start, Justin, Adam, and the entire team were attentive, answered our questions clearly, and recognized immediately that we were grossly underpaid for our claim.  The whole process took a while, but along the way they communicated what was happening, responded to our calls and emails in a timely manner, and were very professional.  Most importantly, they got results!  Cernitz was able to recover more in our settlement than what the insurance company (backed by one of the largest underwriters in the world) initially paid us.  Almost three years after Ian, we were afraid we would never be made “whole” and compensated appropriately, but Cernitz got it done.

If you need to fight “big insurance”, do not hesitate - Cernitz can take them on and win!

reviews.text:
We recently had the pleasure of working with Jim Nosich and his amazing team, and I can confidently say that they exceeded our expectations in every way. From the very beginning, we were struck by their kindness, empathy, and willingness to listen to our concerns.

Jim himself was an absolute pleasure to work with. He took the time to get to know our family and their situation, and he always made us feel like we were his top priority. He was incredibly knowledgeable about malpractice law, and he helped us understand the complexities of the case in a way that was clear and easy to understand.

But Jim's greatness doesn't stop there. His team is simply wonderful. Sharon, in particular, brought such positive energy to every interaction we had. Her high positive vibes were infectious, and she always made us feel like everything was going to be okay.

And Sonia, the paralegal, was JUST amazing. Her loving kindness and motherly touch were exactly what we needed during such a difficult time. She was always there to answer our questions and provide reassurance when we needed it most.

But perhaps the thing I appreciated most about Jim and his team was their clear communication. They were always available to talk, and they never left us wondering about the status of the case. They truly made the entire process so easy to deal with, and their empathy and understanding of our situation made all the difference.

Overall, Jim Nosich and his team were an absolute pleasure to work with. Despite dealing with a horrible situation, they made the family feel supported and understood every step of the way. Their empathy, kindness, and problem-solving skills are unmatched, and I would highly recommend them to anyone in need of a malpractice attorney. Thank you, Jim, Sharon, Sonia, and the entire team, for your wonderful work
