Brian and David Chonin treated me with compassion and respect from the very first call. They made sure I saw the best doctors, guided me through every step, and fought tirelessly for me. My case almost went all the way to trial, but they negotiated an amazing settlement that truly changed my life.

What stood out most was not just their hard work, but how kind and thorough they were throughout the process. They’re not “billboard lawyers” — they’re real people who care deeply about their clients and fight all the way, no matter how tough the case. If you need attorneys who will treat you like family and stand up for you, I can’t recommend the Law Offices of Brian Breiter enough.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ivette thank you so much for the kind words. It was an honor and a pleasure to represent you. David and I fought really hard and made sure that we got you the best possible result under the circumstances.  Thank you for being such a great client and friend

reviews.text:
The Best Legal Representation!!!

I cannot thank the Law Offices of Brian Breiter enough, especially David Chonin, for the incredible support and legal expertise they provided during one of the most traumatic times in my life. I was viciously attacked by four pit bulls while walking in Miami—a horrifying experience that left me physically and emotionally scarred.

From the very beginning, David Chonin was not only a fierce advocate but also a compassionate and steady presence throughout the entire process. He took the time to explain every step, always kept me informed, and made sure I felt supported at all times. His communication was impeccable—he was always available, responsive, and genuinely cared about my recovery and my rights.

Thanks to David’s determination and legal skill, he was able to recover every bit of insurance coverage available to me. He fought tirelessly on my behalf and ensured I received the justice and compensation I deserved.

If you ever find yourself in need of a personal injury attorney, I definitely recommend David Chonin and the entire team at the Law Offices of Brian Breiter. Their dedication, professionalism, and humanity truly set them apart.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nathalee I know it’s been a while since your father’s passing. And I’m sure you must feel the loss even to this day like it was yesterday. It was such an honor to represent you and your sister in this very important place and I’m glad we were able to resolve it for you to your satisfaction. Please stay in touch.

reviews.text:
Life-Changing Representation After My Motorcycle Accident

I can’t say enough good things about attorneys David Chonin and Brian Breiter. I was riding my motorcycle on Alton Road in Miami Beach on my way to work when a Bobcat tractor suddenly turned into me, leaving me with a broken leg and a long road to recovery. It was a terrifying, painful experience but David and Brian made sure I never faced it alone.

David Chonin came to the hospital to meet me personally something I’ll never forget. From that first moment, I knew I was in the hands of people who genuinely cared. Throughout the entire legal process, David was always available to answer my questions, no matter how small or complex. He kept me informed, reassured, and focused when things felt overwhelming.

I chose the Law Offices of Brian Breiter because they are experienced trial lawyers that are not afraid to try cases. The insurance companies know this. Brian and David worked tirelessly on my case, preparing the case for trial. On the eve of trial, they secured a settlement far beyond what I ever expected. Their dedication, legal expertise, and strategic approach made all the difference.

If you’re injured and don’t know where to turn, I wholeheartedly recommend this team. They’re not just great lawyers they’re compassionate advocates who will fight for you like family.

Thank you, David and Brian, for everything.
reviews.ownerResponse: Eduardo, thank you so much for the very kind review. David and I are so happy that we were able to get such a great settlement for you. Despite everything that happened to you, I believe that the result was fair under the circumstances. Thank you for trusting us and letting us go all the way. Stay in touch.

reviews.text: Identity theft is not an easy road to navigate, especially when it happens the first time. After the initial shock if not bewilderment on how such a thing could happen, I called the offices of Brian Breiter since I have known him since he was a star debater in my class years ago. In less than an hour, Mr. Breiter had the issue completely solved with no negative repercussions at all. This did not surprise me; but you can imagine my relief. Kudos to Mr. Breiter and his efficient staff!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the very kind words. We appreciate your support and are always here for you if you need us in the future.

reviews.text: After being side swiped off of the road by a cement truck, I decided to contact Brian Breiter, LLP. His warm and courteous demeanor was just what I needed in a time like this!! He, along with his South Florida partner, David Chonin, were remarkably professional and knowledgeable throughout the process. They kept me informed of things as they arose and they were always available!! We did not end up going to court, but instead was able to get it settled in mediation. This process was seamless and we ended up with WAY more than either of us expected! Best call I could’ve made! I highly recommend their services! Ten out of ten ⭐️’s!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Lori, thank you so much for the kind words. You were an amazing client and it was a pleasure representing you. Please reach out to us anytime you know we are always here for you.

reviews.text: I am so glad to have had Brian and David represent us in our family’s wrongful death case. They were attentive from the beginning and made sure to emphasize on the emotional loss the case had on our family. Thank you David and Brian for your diligence and resilience in fighting for our family. The insurance company wanted to give us less but our attorneys stood their ground in the number that was fair for our family’s loss. We ended up receiving a fair amount due to these attorneys.
reviews.ownerResponse: Miss White thank you so much for the kind words. This was such an honor to represent you and your sister for the tragic loss of your family member. I hope all is well and we are always thinking about you.

reviews.text: Where to begin. What a journey it has been for our family’s wrongful death case. I can confidently say, to have David and Brian as our trial attorneys was a blessing. These men were emotionally supportive as well informative.  With their knowledge, we were able to ask those uncertain questions and always get a timely response. Our family never felt like we were kept out of the loop with what was going on during the duration of our case. Our case did go to trial where the insurance company wasn’t offering a fair amount, until these sharks in the courtroom demanded it with fair reasoning. They fought for what is fair without wavering and kept such a strong stance. If you want to be put in trusted hands especially during such a vulnerable time, they are attorneys that will fight for justice in your case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nicole it was an honor representing your family along with David Chonin. Your father was a great and loving man. I am glad we were able to get Justice for him in the courtroom. May his memory be a blessing to all that knew him.

reviews.text: Brian Breiter's reputation as a top-rated personal injury attorney is well-deserved and anyone looking for an attorney who knows how to effectively fight for them should look no further than Brian Breiter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Robert, thank you for the kind words. We appreciate them.
Gracias

reviews.text:
A couple of years ago it was a beautiful day in Los Angeles and I was driving to the airport, next thing I know I’m in a horrible accident and my life is turned upside down. I’ve never been in a crash like this before, and I knew it was serious. It was obvious I was going to need legal help so I started searching online and asking friends. After doing tons of research I narrowed my search down to two law firms, the Law Offices of Brian Breiter and Movagar and Yamin.

I met with both firms and was impressed with each of them. When I interviewed them, I asked what their opinions were of the other firm, and they both said the same thing, great lawyers you can’t go wrong. I found out after talking with Brian Breiter that Nick Movagar used to work with him and that they often work on cases together. At that point Brian suggested that both firms could work together on the case, and that’s exactly what happened. I thought how can I lose, I get two lawyers for the price of one. Nick was amazing at helping me get access to the best doctors. I ended up needing a serious back surgery, and he found one of the best spine surgeons in Los Angeles.

The recovery was hard, but Brian and Nick made it easy. After the surgery they both arranged to have a nurse take care of me at home so I wouldn’t be alone. Nick arranged for a great physical therapy and after care.

Because the injuries were so serious and my medical bills were high the case had to go into litigation. Nicks firm handled the initial part of the case. When it became obvious that the insurance company was not going to pay what I deserved, Brain took over and prepared the case for the trial.

I felt in great hands with both firms. Nick and Brian made themselves available to me anytime. I had questions, a lot, and would sometimes text them on the weekends or in the middle of the night and they were always there to reassure me. The time came for the trial, but just before that the defense probably got scared and agreed to go to mediation. It was a long hard negotiation and Brian was there the whole way. He was a great negotiator, and we were able to settle the case for a fantastic and very fair outcome.

At the end of the case, Nick was amazing, he made sure that my medical bills, which were very high because I did not have insurance, were reduced so that I was left with a large part of the settlement. I really appreciated how hard he fought for me. It was a hard choice choosing between these two great attorneys, so I chose them both. I was lucky they agreed to work together, they make a great team. Thank you guys for taking such good care of me! 5 star service.

I was hit by a car walking in a crosswalk in Beverly Hills, CA. It happened almost 2 years ago. Engaging Brian and his team shortly thereafter was one of my best decisions ever.

His knowledge, and confidence told me I was working with the best professionals I could have found.

Brian's guidance was invaluable. He listened and helped me throughout the case. We were both patient and that patience produced positive results.

Give Brian a call immediately when the need for a great lawyer comes up in your life!

Brian has been a fantastic attorney. He's smart, friendly, and he gets results.  I took a nasty fall in a theater. When my previous attorney advised me that he felt my case was not worth pursuing, Brian took it and netted me a substantial settlement.  I have been in several unfortunate car accidents - I live in Los angeles, which is like a giant bumper car game - and he has, each time, helped me negotiate the sometimes excruciating gauntlet of insurance company obstacles.  Brian is professional, expert, personable, and a tiger in negotiation. I will use him again

When I was first looking for help with my bike accident I really couldn't believe that a lawyer could have 100% 5 star reviews.

But now I understand why. Brian and his team genuinely car for every single one of their clients.

At every step of the process of resolving the claim for my accident Brian and his team have been incredible - from making sure I got proper treatment, through talking me through the claim process and what to expect, through the multiple stages of the claim they have always been there and always been friendly and professional. My calls are always returned. My emails answered.

I can not thank them enough.

If you are unfortunate enough to be involved in an accident call Brian first.

My daughter was only 11 years old when her father was involved in a motorcycle accident with a vehicle belonging to the City of Los Angeles. David remained in a coma for over six months and died on my daughter's birthday from Traumatic Brain Injury.
The evening of the accident, my brother gave me a number of an attorney he had heard about and told me to call immediately. I'm so glad I called that same night. Overwhelmed and numb, I talked with Brian for hours on the phone, still in shock, explaining what had happened to David that morning and the delicate situation involving my daughter.
Brian listened attentively and was able to comfort and advise me. This was what he would consistently do for me for the next two years. Brian was always available, considerate, trustworthy, professional, and compassionate. He immediately arranged for conservatorship, medical assistance, and the myriad of legal procedures that would involve a complicated wrongful death case against the City of Los Angeles. Brian was always kind to my daughter as well as sensitive to the impact she would go through from having her father in a coma and ultimately his death. Brian and Mark were always professional and available when answering my never ending questions or clarifying the legal process.
It's important for me to say that Brian changed our lives when everything went dark. He gently guided us for two years through this experience. The case was settled and we found resolution. My daughter and I can now continue the process to heal from our devastating loss with resilience and strength.
When you work with Brian and his tireless team, you will understand why people say he is truly the best of the best. My daughter and I are both forever grateful to work with Brian. He continues to be there for us.

BREIT, BREITER, BREITEST
Finding Brian Breiter was like finding that pot of gold at the end of the rainbow. He is an L.A. treasure in the world of litigation and personal injury. All of the reviews contained on this page are 100% right on and accurate and express all of my same sentiments. If I were to elaborate, I would only be "gushing", however, that is exactly what I would like to do. If you find yourself in that awful predicament of being in an auto collision (I use that description rather than "accident"), call Brian..asap. This guy is cool, calm, collected, caring, cohesive, and oh so focused! He slam-dunked my case is 3 months.
About my case: the day after my birthday on Aug. 16th I made a completely legal, clean left turn, when this woman ran a red light and slammed into me so hard, she t-boned my car and made me spin out onto the sidewalk. Yep, my car was totaled. I had another attorney who didn't work out, and then I found Brian Breiter..the "man". I called him in October and met with him at his office around the middle of Oct.
Fast forward to January 22, 2014, when Brian called to tell me that everything was settled and to drop by his office to pick up my check! All those doctor visits and physical therapy and aches and pains had been taken care of and now I had my settlement. I don't ever want to go through such an ordeal again, but if I do, the first call I make will be to Brian J. Breiter..The Breitest star on Wilshire Blvd.

And let me strongly adivse anyone out there who has a similar unfortunate incident occur, don't hesitate, don't wait, pick up the phone and call BRIAN J. BREITER!!! Just do it..you will be happy you did.

I have nothing but great things to say about Mark, Brian, and the rest of the team. They know exactly what they are doing, were incredibly professional, and most of all, they cared. I didn't have to bug them or even communicate much because they were upfront about the timeline  and I knew they were taking care of things.

I was involved in an accident with an out of state driver that resulted in me tearing my ACL and needing 2 different surgeries to fix it. He ran a stop sign and just didn't see me. After the first conversation with their insurance adjustor to be paid out for the total loss of my car, I knew it was going to be a pain dealing with them because they were bickering over the $100 or so that I wanted to replace my tinted windows. I started to imagine what it would be like dealing with them over the phone with 10s or 100s of thousands of dollars on the line.

That's when I hired Mark and Brian to handle everything and that they did. I was rest assured knowing that the insurance company would respect that and their firm as they bring wrongful death cases to trail. Knowing that allowed me to focus 100% on the recovery and rehab. It took over 3.5 years for everything to settle and I'm confident in saying that they helped me receive quite a far larger settlement than I believe I would have been able to get on my own or elsewhere.

They are the real deal. I feel privileged that they were able to work with me. They aren't some massive shop that just takes every case they can.  They were responsive, strategic, smart, upfront,  and not once did I feel like just another number. They cared about my health and treated me as a friend the entire way through. They don't take everyone, but If they say they'll bring you on as a client, I'd absolutely recommend it ASAP.

On October 27, 2015 my brother was killed in a tragic accident.  He was riding his bike home from the beach.  A semi with a shipping container was traveling the same way as he was, he was going under a bridge at  the same time as the semi with the shipping container. As the semi made its  way under the bridge the load was too high, the shipping container clipped the top of the bridge and fell onto my brother as he was riding his bike and killed him instantly.  My brother was my everything, he was the only one left out of my immediate family.  I’ll never forget the night, the coroner came to my house as soon as he introduced himself as the coroner I knew that my brother was dead.  I remember all my family coming over that night and the next morning there was all different news vans sitting in front of my house channel 7 channel 9 channel 4.etc...  they were pounding on my door at 7:30 8 o’clock in the morning, I never once gave the news a statement, I was too distraught so my cousins would always tell them to go away.  Then I had a lot of lawyers waiting in front of my house because they wanted my business, I also had a couple of shady characters trying to get me to hire them to represent my brothers case, when I say shady I mean they were trying to do anything and everything to get me to hire them. At this point I did not know what to do so I started researching lawyers and Brian’s name came up.  His name came up actually several times with 100% success rate.  I finally met with Brian and my family was telling me that I should meet with at least three more lawyers to get a second and third opinion.  At this time I really didn’t feel like meeting with different lawyers I just didn’t have the energy I felt so drained from everything.  After I met with Brian my cousins and I went to go have some Pho, and on the fortune cookie that I got it said your first choice will be the wisest  to follow at this time.  After that fortune cookie I knew that Brian was my first choice and he was the wisest choice.  So I highly recommend Brian he’s one of the best trial lawyers around or to me is the best!  2 1/2 years later it was bittersweet but my brothers case was finally settled and Brian did an amazing job even though there’s no amount of money that can bring my brother back, Brian made sure that I got the max amount.  Thank you Brian Brieter you’re the best!

Brian Breiter, Thank you and your team for all your efforts. Thank you for making the painful and stressful process very relieving. Two years ago when I told a few friends that my lawyer was "Super Lawyer, Brian Breiter ", they told me, ahh you'll never even get him on the phone. Well every time I called, you picked up. So that is much appreciated. And Congratulations on the opening of the new office in Miami.
PS I still want a rematch at Backgammon.

Brian Breiter is an awesome lawyer and a really great guy. I was a pedestrian crushed between two cars and suffered a severe injury. I called Brian up, and he came to see me in the hospital shortly after I had my accident. I was hurt really bad and he assured me that in time I'd be ok. He explained the process of my case to me, and answered any questions that I had. He was really there for my recovery.  He got the case settled in a timely manner. And when it was all said and done I got a good deal money. I greatly appreciate all the hard work that he a n his team did and I'd recommend if you need a great attorney to hire Brian Breiter.

Many years ago, when Brian Brieter was in Law School, a mutual acquaintance of ours commented that Brian was going to be a great Lawyer. The person making the comment was a prominent member of our community who knew lawyers. I saw the person making the comment recently and reminded him of what he had said about Brian back in the day. We both are really impressed about Brian's very successful law career and the legions of people he had helped over the years.
Every time I need a lawyer I ask Brian what he thinks and he very carefully takes the time to listen and advise me. It impresses me that very often he has advised me for free. In addition, He has referred me to other lawyers because it was away from his area of expertise.
Brian very clearly lays out a road map and strategy with different alternatives,  makes sure to put you at ease and assure you that things will be alright.
Brian is tenacious, bright, thoughtful and a great communicator. He has an uncanny ability to keep things light with his sense of humor yet he is very serious about achieving his clients goals!
I am not easily impressed, but I highly recommend Brian Brieter to anyone needing legal advice!

I have worked closely with Brian and his fellow lawyers. They do amazing work and have helped my patients get compensated for their injuries. I take emergency room call and have many trauma patients who ask for a referral to a lawyer to help them. I work with many lawyers because of my work at level 1 trauma centers, and they are by far the best. Patient reported settlement and jury awarded results that are significantly higher. Recently, I also had a patient get injured and had a grossly disfigured nose. Her insurance denied her treatment at the time of her injury, wanted her to follow up and get treatment at the insurance facility. They guaranteed that she would be expeditiously seen and treated. She was discharged from the emergency room and called her insurance right away. They told her that they wouldn't be able to see her for a week. She contacted Brian Breiter, he referred her to me without knowing that I had seen her the day before, and arranged to have her surgery with me to fix her broken nose the next day. Brian and his fellow lawyers are talented, and take care of their clients by arranging for both the best medical care and getting them the maximum monetary compensation possible. I would not go to anyone else if I were injured and was looking for a good lawyer.

I was driving on my way to work last June when a ride sharing service car cut me off trying to make a right turn from the middle lane, struck my car and ultimately ending up pushing me into another vehicle. My car  was deemed totaled and I was at a loss at what steps to take next. After a recommendation from a coworker to pursue legal action I was introduced to Brian.

From our very first meeting I was treated with nothing but kindness and respect. I had never been in an accident before and really felt quite helpless. I was deemed "ok" by the medics when they arrived but was still in severe pain after the accident. It was only because of Brian's recommendation that I got an MRI- turns out I had several herniated discs in my lower back!

Brian and his whole team took care of setting me up with the best orthopedic, PT team, and massage therapist. They truly were focused on me getting better and always checked in throughout the whole process anytime I had a question or concern. Whether it be by email, phone, or even texting on Brians personal cell they were always available to me.

When I first met with Brian he was confident that he would win my case and gave me an idea of what my settlement amount could be. Well not only did he WIN but he more than doubled the initial amount AND was able to reduce ALL of my medical bills.

This whole process (minus the accident) was a breeze! Brian will forever be my personal injury lawyer and I would highly recommend his services to anyone!

In October of 2013, I was crossing the street near my own home in LA when I was hit by an SUV.

Nothing can prepare you for something like that. The is no step by step guide for what to do next.

All I knew is I needed help. I needed someone to help me go through this as the car that hit me did not call for help and did not report what happened. The driver also did not give me any information other than a name and phone number which went straight to voicemail every time I tried calling.

I was clearly hurt, I was limping and falling and since no one arrived at the scene when I was hurt, I was basically advocating for myself, which I found out, is VERY difficult to do after such a traumatic event.

Before I found Brian and Marc, I found myself being sent home from the er  hospital and doctor multiple times with a pat on the back, letting me know it is painful to get by a car but I would feel better soon since I am younger than 40.

This dance lasted until my own health insurance had enough complaints to referred me to an orthopedic doctor. I finally got an appointment to see the orthopedic doctor a week after thanksgiving. The moment the orthopedic doctor laid eyes on me, he inquired why no one was helping me go through this.

I didn't even realize what I was going through was wrong. I didn't even realize I needed help.

My orthopedic doctor let me know I needed 3 MRIs. The sooner the better.

Unfortunately, since I was going through my own insurance, the doctor informed me I could receive the referrals for MRIs maybe by January of the following year. I bursted into tears in the orthopedic doctor's office. I already wasn't sleeping because of the pain. My body was no longer my own. No one seemed to care.

I knew I needed help. That evening, in my desperation, I turned to Yelp after googling for the best lawyer in LA.

When I found Brian Breiter's page, every review I read was truthful and positive. The more reviews I read, the more it became clear: this was a team who cared.

I figured that my situation couldn't get any worse that what happened that day in the orthopedic doctor's office. I took a chance and I called them.

I am so glad I did. Although I was scared, hurt, confused, unsure of what to do, they believed me and were willing to meet with me.

I walked into Brian's office, limping with 2 young children in tow. The minute I saw Brian and Marc, they believed me and were willing to represent me.

15 minutes later, I was sent in an uber to a doctor and I got immediate care. It turned out I had real issues with my neck, back, my arms and my left leg. I had definitely needed more than just home care.

By that evening, a plan to care for my injuries and to recover from them was set in motion.

For the next FOUR YEARS, we talked about my care every step of the way. Anytime I called, anyone I spoke to knew who I was. Every time I called, the call always ended with "Don't worry about anything. Focus on getting better" and Brian absolutely delivered.  I finally got the medical care I had desperately needed.

Brian and Marc saw me for what I was: a young wife and mother of 2 young children whose lives have changed from this accident. The compassion and understanding is something that definitely made a difference to my family and I.

Although nothing in the world can ever fix the pain I have or replace the time I lost as I continuing to recover from this accident, Brian and Marc made sure justice was delivered to my family and I.

There are not enough words to express how grateful I am to have found a lawyer like Brian. My family and I whole lives are much better because Brian is willing to be someone who fights for what's fair. Thank you Brian and Marc!

Brian is a great lawyer. A few years ago I was on my way to standup gig a benefit for the AA club in Orange. While en route through Cypress I was a victim of a hit and run drunk driver, the irony is not lost on me.
My car was totaled and I was left unconscious, injured and in need of medical attention. After I was released from the hospital I immediately called Brian. Brian took a horrifically traumatic moment in my life and made it a lot easier. He managed the insurance, hospital and ambulance phone calls and worked diligently to resolve my case fast. Since then, whenever anyone is in need of a personal injury attorney I don't hesitate to refer them to Brain, simply because he's the best and gets results. I hope no one has to go through what I went through, but if you do leave it up to Brian he's a professional.

Thank you Brian Breiter. Thank you for your concern. For your personal care. For your attentiveness. For your expertise. Thank you for making a terribly unfortunate incident in my life less terrible. I was bitten in the face by a Bull Mastiff. For those of you who do not know what that is it's a very large dog. He took a chunk right out of my face. I bled horribly and was rushed to the ER where I received well over 100 stitches in my face. I was referred to Mr Breiter and his team by a longtime friend who I deem trustworthy and knowledgable. After arranging what seemed to be almost an immediate meeting the day after the incident Brian formulated a precision game plan, recommended an evaluation of my face by a top plastic surgeon, and also asked if I thought I might need any kind of therapy to assist me in what could possibly be a fear of dogs in the future. He coached me well for the deposition. He went head to head with the heartless insurance company representing the dog's owner who was careless. Brian fought hard for me. I remember being so impressed by the amount of respect he commanded for the defendant's lawyer. Brian has swagger. He's got style. He's got the know-how to get the job done. He did not rest until all of my bills were paid and I walked away with a very nice settlement. I definitely have a scar to show for it but as they say, when life gives you lemons, call Brian Breiter. I'd give 100 stars if I could. Seriously.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jason, you are one of the bravest clients I’ve ever had. You also have the best attitude for someone who went through such a horrible ordeal. You are very lucky that the surgeons were able to do such a good job, and that you still are devastatingly handsome! You have become a great friend throughout this process and I treasure our relationship.

reviews.text:
Xiomara was very attentive since my first phone call. During the appointment she sat down with my mom to explain the Lady Bird Deed in a very respectful and human manner, there are topics that are very sensitive and she handled it amazingly. Excellent profesional and super kind person.
Thank you!
Working with you was excellent. The attention, service, and communication were perfect. Thank you.

Thank you Sánchez Vadillo LLC for your representation before the closing of the sale, for your management and accompaniment throughout the process especially to Jhosmelina and Hely... You are a great team I recommend you very much.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Once again, it has been a great pleasure working with this wonderful team.
Jhosmelina and Heli - Sánchez Vadillo

Every time we work with you, you remind us of a service filled with professionalism, dedication, and human quality.

You truly appreciate the love and commitment you put into every detail, and for that, we are not only happy, but completely grateful. Thank you for your patience, attention, communication, and the quality with which you handle everything.

We will definitely continue to recommend you again and again. You are a great team!
Thank you for everything 🤍✨

Daymara Aleman
CanvasRE

Great law firm — always on top of everything! I’ve been working with them for over 5 years and couldn’t be happier. Professional, reliable, and truly dedicated. Looking forward to many more years together.
Excellent service, and the most convenient thing is the speed at which they work. 100% recommended. Experience, wisdom, and speed make the difference.
Ask for xiomara

Our deal had all types of curveballs: tough clients, crazy deadlines, and delayed funds. Xiomara handled all the documentation like a pro. Her communication was crystal clear, she answered emails at lightning speed, and she kept everyone on track when things got messy.

Thanks to her hustle and calm focus, we landed a smooth closing. Felt completely in good hands with Xiomara running point! A huge asset to her firm
100% recommended
It's definitely a wonderful experience working with you all again, especially Xiomara Polanco, whose dedication and professionalism make us feel secure in our transactions. Thank you very much.
Very Great
Xiomara did outstanding work! Great professionalism, Patience, and Support.
Excellent service. Everything was handled with great diligence, honesty, and clarity. Thank you to Jhosmelina Quintero and her entire team.
Excellent service in all my closing. Professional people who accompany you throughout the process. Thank you Jhosmelina for your invaluable help.
Everything was excellent! Great work, calm and serious! Thank you.

I had the pleasure of working with Aichel Pérez, a process manager at SV Law, during the sale of the property located at 10150 SW 228 Ter, and I have nothing but words of admiration and gratitude for her impeccable work.

Aichel is an extraordinary professional who not only performs her duties with excellence but also adds invaluable value to the process. She was present at every stage of the transaction, always communicative, clear, and willing to help. Her commitment, attention to detail, and efficiency were key to ensuring everything was completed on time and worry-free.

Working with her and her team was a true peace of mind for both me and my clients. I recommend her 100% without hesitation. Thank you, Aichel, for making a difference!

Review: Achel Pérez - 2760 Northeast 7th Street
She was wonderful! Professional yet warm, she made the closing so much easier! Thank you!

Heli and Jhosmelina are true professionals who have great comminution skills and handle matters expeditiously. My experience is always top tier with Sanchez Vadillo and especially with the Heli and Jhosmelina!

I had the oportunity to work with Aichel Perez as our processor on the selling of our house. She was absolutely amazing. On top of everything, always answered our calls, was knowledgeable and polite. Definitely will use Sanchez- Vadillo in the future.
The best law firm in Miami without a doubt..

Highly recommend their services.

Jhosmelina Quintero was awesome!

Thank you to all the team!!!

★★★★★

Working with Jhosmelina was a seamless and professional experience from start to finish! Their team was knowledgeable, responsive, and ensured a smooth closing process. I highly recommend them for any real estate transactions!

Excellent service, my company and I are really satisfied, the attention from Xiomara and Michelle is wonderful, they helped us in our transaction and not only that, they supported us even more than this, they always answered our questions and were always on time. Thank you for your services, I will definitely call you again. Thanks again.

“I had a fantastic experience with Marie Their team was professional, efficient, and extremely knowledgeable throughout the entire process. From handling all the paperwork to answering my questions, they made everything. She kept me informed at every step and ensured a smooth closing. I truly appreciated their attention to detail and excellent customer service. I highly recommend Sanchez Vadillo as a Title company to anyone in need of reliable title services. They go above and beyond!”

Feel free to tailor it with your own specific experiences!

EXCELLENT!!! Thank you to the entire Titulo team, especially Jhosmelina, who assisted us throughout the entire transaction from beginning to end. Her office represented my clients, who were both the seller and the buyer, and both were extremely happy with the service, advice, and support from day one until closing. We closed in just three weeks and were able to help sellers who were abroad to close remotely. Thank you, team, and thank you, Jhosmelina! 100% recommended!

Dealt with title company for closing of a house. Nightmare for both us and the seller to get funds transferred. Don't bother calling to get any updates or ask questions. No matter what time of the day you call you won't get an answer or any calls returned.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We strive to provide exceptional service and take your concerns seriously. We kindly ask that you contact our office directly and ask for Melaney, our Firm Administrator, to discuss your experience in more detail. Your input is valuable to us, and we want to address this matter promptly. Thank you for giving us the opportunity to resolve this.

reviews.text: My family had a closing today on a property and were delighted with the service and treatment, thanks to the entire team and especially Heli. This transaction was a pleasure. As a realtor, and out of town, I had the support I needed and I am very grateful… HIGHLY recommended.

We contacted this firm to assist us in the selling of our beauty salon business. From the beginning to the end this firm was excellent on handling all the documents and representing us. Calls and emails returned promptly. Everyone super professional especially Xiomara who was diligent and quick to answer all of our questions. Thank you all so much!

HIGHLY recommend this firm!!
Professional, efficient and knowledgeable... Great experience!
They are truly a very professional and efficient team. I will gladly recommend them to my clients.

I had the pleasure of working with Inalvis Zubiaur and Xiomara Polanco during a recent commercial real estate transaction for my client. Their expertise and professionalism were invaluable throughout the process.

Inalvis and Xiomara was thorough in reviewing all documents and made sure that every detail was handled with precision. They communicated effectively, keeping both my client and me informed at every stage.

Their proactive approach and deep understanding of commercial law helped ensure a smooth transaction. I truly appreciate their dedication and hard work, and I highly recommend Sanchez Vadillo to anyone in need of legal assistance.

Thank you for your outstanding service!

My clients and I were represented by Xiomara Polanco, and she is undoubtedly an excellent professional. She handled and guided my clients through the legal aspects in a highly professional manner. Highly recommended.
Thankful for Xiomara’s help in guiding me through the closing process and ensuring everything went smoothly. Highly recommend.
Excellent service, response, communication and knowledge.
Best
I have used this office for multiple closings, great experience overall.
Extremely professional team!!!

I had an excellent experience with Sanchez and Valdillo LLP. Jhosmelina Quintero was very professional and diligent.

Thank you for your support.

Jhosmelina @ Sanchez Vadillo LLP did amazing work from start to finish with getting our transaction closed and funded in a very time appropriate manner! 100% suggest their company for all title/closing services!

I had to use theses people for closing a couple years ago. They held over $5000 in escrow almost a year and a half after my closing. I produced all the proper documentation to get my money out of escrow bout 2 weeks after after my closing. They were very hard to contact and get communication with. They ignored phone calls and had to email them excessively to try to get answers about how to get my money out of escrow. I eventually had to take it to court and finally got the answers I needed. Be very careful using these people for closings or anything that involves your money.
Top notch title company, excellent attorneys that know their craft in real estate. Great customer service as well.

Lawyers are friendly and professional.
Office is neat.
Congratulations, you are the best! Excellent service and professionalism. Thank you.

I just had a commercial closing with Titlelogic, and XIOMARA was assigned to see the transaction through to the end. She was very attentive; every time I contacted her, she responded almost immediately. She truly made the negotiations and closing process very smooth. If you're a Titlelogic customer or are planning to be one, request to work with her. I assure you, you'll be in good hands. Oh! And she's also super friendly! It was genuinely a pleasure to work with her."
Great Lawyers, Great people, Great group.
Great experience, knowledgeable and very helpful.
We had a great experience. Xiomara was really professional and took good care of all the details of our transactions. We definitely recommend this firm!
Shady company I do not recommend at all. They take 30% !! when other places only do 3-10% this is so shady.

I recommended this website because I saw a lot of advertising and they seemed very committed. Twenty days after starting the process, I received an email saying they could no longer represent me and that I should find someone else, just like that, without any further explanation. I will recommend them again, but only so that no one ever contacts them again, not even by mistake! Terrible service.

I was in an accident and they have people calling me that sound super shady misrepresenting themselves. Both calls started with “we are calling from Florida, we represent the state of Florida.”
When I asked what is the name of the company, so I could look them up, the first lady claimed they were not a company, they were a department. I said, “ok Department of what company or organization” and she said they were just a department and that there was no website I could go to nor office I could visit. She kept making it seem like the state of Florida wanted to look out for me and tell me I had the right to these benefits. I asked to be removed off their list that I would deal with my insurance directly.

24 hours later a get a call from a man, and started the same way, misrepresenting themselves. He also added they were a group of attorneys! I immediately asked for the website of the company, after getting a lot of talk around I eventually got him to give me the website and sure enough it was not the state of Florida. I explained the shady phone call I had had the day before and that I didn’t appreciate the lies and misrepresentation and that I would deal with my insurance directly, his tone shifted to rude immediately and he said he was going to email my insurance and say I didn’t want any of the benefits.

No wonder insurances are getting so high, they were pushing that I could go to clinics to get therapy, after i said i was ok and I suffered no injury; then he said I could also get a check for missed work hours - after I had already explained I work from home and won’t miss work.
They also said they would keep 33% of the money my insurance would pay for “providing the service”
This is what they do to scam insurances and get people to engage in their scams.

Update 2 days later:
It seems like a theme with these people, they called again and when I told them my previous experience with their other representatives and that I was not interested, the person I was speaking “Alejandro” changed his tone and said he was going to call my insurance and say I didn’t want any of the benefits. What kind of company is that if we choose not to take on their services they end  the call  with a threat!
Wrong address..
I had a terrible experience with Angie Lopez. Unprofessional, unorganized, and poor communication. I would have hired them if it weren't for that.
Neighbor  to this tony parties until 2 am kept my baby up all night if he is that inconsiderate with neighbors imagine what he is to clients
100% service and attention

WORST EXPERIENCE EVER.They're great at the time of getting you as a new customer,after they got you,FORGET about trying to get an update on your case or get in contact with them.Tried for weeks to contact Mrs.Gaby from that fraud company but declined my calls,never replied my messages,This company is a Fraud
Scam! Trying to sell legal consult
Zulaima Márquez is incredibly rude. And unprofessional.

Beautiful offices, very professional and efficient fast service. It’s never been difficult to make contact with them. They definitely have made the process so much easier and understandable after the accident.
After a car accident they help me with the entire process amazing people!!!
Excellent organization, quality of service and teamwork.
The best service ☺️
The best in the accident area!!
The best 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻
I love 305 no fault group ! The best team .

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for rating us.  We appreciate your trust and confidence in allowing us our provide services.

reviews.text: Love It
I have never even been to this place and it looks like a scam specially this Kathy  Garcia person look for her on Facebook she's promoting the company.
Good service.
Scam Scam Scam don’t believe anything they say!!!!
excellent services, very professional!!!!
Excellent!

Scam! Scam! Scam! They refer you to a Dr. who does nothing to treat you.  The physical therapy is administered by a massage therapist.. they rape and pillage your insurance policy for months while making you think the other guy's insurance is going to pay you. Out of nowhere, the attorney that never met with you, called to check on you, send you a letter dropping your case. I'm still hurt and I have no compensation.. this has to be illegal!
reviews.ownerResponse: We regret to hear that your experience with one of our Personal Injury Advisors was not exceptional and take your comments very seriously.  We pride ourselves on helping our clients find the legal advice and medical care they need to recover from their injuries and losses resulting from an auto accident, slip & fall accident, or other similar accidents.  We are not a law firm and do not provide legal advice.  As a referral service, The No-Fault Group is here to connect you with experienced attorneys and doctors that will make sure you understand your rights and receive the care and compensation you are entitled to. We would greatly appreciate it if you could email us at info@thenofaultgroup.com, so we may contact you to further understand how we could have served you better.

reviews.text: This a place where you go if you get into a car accident  and you get refferd  to an attorney 3months into your car accident
If you've been involved in an accident your fault or not this is the place to call for help! They help get you treated and compensated. Great staff and great results
The best people best group to let handle your case.
Excellent place

I am so grateful to Claudia, Carlos, and Julio for their tremendous support and the excellent work they did in my case, and especially to Mr. Julio 🙏🏻. They were always attentive, explaining everything clearly and giving me peace of mind during such an important process for me. They are a very professional and caring team. I recommend them 100%. Thank you for your commitment and dedication!

My experience with this lawyer was profoundly disappointing. From the very first moment, he displayed an absolute lack of professional ethics and empathy. He didn't introduce himself or even greet us when we arrived at his office, which immediately set a low bar for his professionalism and discourteous nature.

Throughout the entire meeting, he maintained a rude, distant, and superior attitude, as if he believed himself to be better than his clients because of his financial situation. He showed no genuine interest in listening to or understanding our situation; his only concern seemed to be money, without the slightest human or professional consideration.

At no point was he friendly, did he smile, or create an atmosphere of trust, something fundamental when dealing with legal matters, which are often sensitive. I definitely do not recommend him: a lawyer should support and guide their clients, not treat them with contempt and coldness.

This has been my worst experience with an immigration lawyer. They were very attentive during the initial consultation, but after that, nothing. They were very punctual when it came to collecting payment, but after two years, they did absolutely nothing. We paid them in full, and they never even handled a case.

I had two appointments with my representative, they said they would call me on the day of the appointment, and both times they just stood me up. I've been calling for two months now and they don't answer.

Terrible experience. Don’t fall for what he says about “if no one can take her out, I can” and don’t fall for him talking about his connections and how everything is possible.

This lawyer did a horrible job handling my family friend’s case. From the beginning, it felt like they cared more about getting paid than actually doing their job. We could barely get any answers or updates, and every time we asked something, it felt like we were bothering them.

In the end, we had to handle almost everything ourselves. We were getting information and answers from other places long before the lawyer ever bothered to say anything. They didn’t guide us, didn’t communicate, and didn’t take responsibility for anything. For the amount of stress and money involved, their service was unbelievably disappointing.

Save yourself the frustration and look for someone who actually cares about their clients. This was a complete waste of time and money.

I absolutely do not recommend this lawyer or his firm. For over eight months, they made no progress on my case. I only received calls to collect fees, but I never saw any results or real follow-up. They promised many things and delivered none. I feel disappointed and cheated. I recommend reading reviews before hiring their services.

Reviewing the reviews, I see that many satisfied clients haven't had the same experience as others. I've also seen many who were assisted by the same people. We'd need to find out which office they belong to so we can transfer our files to the correct one. I'm part of the dissatisfied group; at the beginning of the process, everything was fine, but after the work permits were approved, things fizzled out, and then after everything was paid off, the divorce came, and I wasn't informed about it.

Note: If I'm not mistaken, the person whose presence we've felt most strongly is the new legal representative, Alba García, in Orlando. She's helped us resolve some specific situations, which is why we don't recommend her.
I went to the first consultation and I left feeling like it was a really bad experience.

Good afternoon, I'm writing here desperately because my deadline to send my case is approaching. I hired you with enough time for everything to be sent correctly and now no one answers me. If I call customer service, I get an answering machine. The paralegal assigned to me says that he has to wait for a response from his superiors. I'm really worried. Please, I don't know how to contact you.

I don't recommend them: they left me waiting for an hour today, and then they told me the lawyer connected but I didn't: hahahaha, it was hilarious 🤣. I logged on 5 minutes earlier and nobody ever connected. Now let's suppose they're having problems with the lines in the United States, hahahaha, why? They didn't call me back. They told me, "Mr. Jesus, we have a connection problem, therefore until it's resolved we can't hear you." Like they say: PLEASE DON'T BELIEVE EVERYTHING YOU SEE ON SOCIAL MEDIA: it's a thousand times better to deal with a discreet person who isn't involved in these kinds of things. Bad luck for being irresponsible.

I've read many negative reviews of the Sanabria & Associates law firm, but in my experience, I highly recommend them. They are a team of highly skilled and responsible professionals. I appreciate the attention I received from attorney Sanabria during our interview, as well as from attorney Olanmarie (who did an excellent job) and attorney Julio Cabello (and, importantly, the paralegals who assisted throughout the entire process). They all did a great job with me. In my case, my work permit was approved within a month of being issued, and they were very attentive throughout the process. Thank you, and keep up the good work with this professionalism.

I only went to an initial consultation; the lawyer spent more time on the computer than actually attending to me. In the end, the only time she showed any real interest was when we talked about money, which fortunately wasn't in line with them due to bad feelings.
Very bad service we lost our money
Beware of this company. They take your money and then refuse to answer calls, follow up, or do anything.
Terrible

I want to express my dissatisfaction with the service received. I'm seeking a second opinion from the lawyer. There's no other option but asylum. I expected zero empathy. More detailed attention. With a magnifying glass and documents, given that this is about integrity and sensitivity, thank goodness the record wasn't disclosed, or else I'd end up worse off. They don't inspire trust; they don't care about people's integrity. If they don't subject asylum seekers to whatever, after a deportation order is issued, they wash their hands and take their money, plus more responsibility for the cases. We can't blame the government entirely, but rather the irresponsibility of the lawyers.

These people are scammers who prey on their clients' dreams and the idea of ​​getting a "good lawyer." I requested an appointment with them by phone a while ago, and because my mother, who was with me, took a while to answer a question, they hung up and blocked us on Instagram! My God, a professional group of lawyers would never do that. Grow up!

I do not recommend these people for any process. They lack professional, effective, and ethical communication. I have repeatedly had the unpleasant experience of not returning calls, and false promises of what they promise. I have experienced on several occasions the endless wait, mocked by the teenage girls who work at the reception desk. When I am attended to by different people after many minutes on hold, they have the nerve to playfully pass the phone around, always asking the same question. This generates helplessness and frustration as migrants. Claudia, the paralegal, is a ghost who exists but does not exist. The lawyer seems to work in the White House. I am not a pro bono lawyer, and I have not been able to receive consistent, friendly, and respectful follow-up on my asylum case. I have simply had to constantly call and check to see if communication is possible. But no, it has still been unsuccessful. Gentlemen. WE CANNOT ABUSE ANYONE'S PATIENCE. Patience has something underlying every human being, and it is dignity and the right to be treated as we should by supposed professionals with ethics and clarity. It is very unpleasant for me to have to get irritated and speak rudely to the girls and to you because you do not provide the service you offer. You are disrespectful and irresponsible. I am Mrs. Maryoset Quintero. And I feel disappointed. I do not feel represented by you. Attorney Andreina and paralegal Claudia and the entire cast that composes you need to develop courses in human relations and customer service. Relationships are based on presence and trust. A serious face does not guarantee seriousness. Seriousness is showing your face with a friendly presence and following up on the asylum case. Imagine that next week they will finally appear to continue collecting, which is what interests them: people's money, and continue losing cases due to their lack of commitment to us, the clients.

We hired this lawyer over a year ago, based on recommendations from some "influencers." The paralegal they assigned us doesn't respond to emails or calls. I requested a copy of their case file, but they haven't replied. So, if you don't want to waste your money or your time, find another lawyer who is responsible and professional. Don't trust this scammer, and don't believe any more of the recommendations from these supposed "influencers" because they're not true.

I hired them about three years ago to handle my asylum case, and they never answer calls, emails, or ANYTHING. All they care about is your money. Before signing the contract, they're very efficient and friendly, but once you hire them, you NEVER hear from them again. I have to follow up on my case myself because the court dates keep changing, and they never notify me. Don't waste your money on this lawyer who's now more interested in celebrity than actual work—it's all marketing. You're better off finding a lawyer with better references! Good luck! 🌸

My experience with the Sanabria law firm has been extremely disappointing. I hired them hoping for professional legal representation, but I received the complete opposite.

From the very beginning, it was very difficult to communicate with them. They didn't answer my calls or emails, which is unacceptable for any client paying for legal services. The lack of follow-up and attention was total.

The worst happened on the day of my court hearing. My lawyer was unprepared, didn't present the arguments properly, and showed a completely indifferent attitude toward my case. It was a frustrating and distressing moment, as I felt completely alone facing an important legal matter.

Unfortunately, I'm not the only one who has gone through this. I've heard from other clients who have had equally negative experiences: broken promises, a lack of professionalism, and terrible customer service.

I do not recommend this firm to anyone. If you are looking for serious and committed legal representation, I advise you to look elsewhere. Don't put your case — or your money — in the hands of lawyers who don't care about their clients.

The paralegal I have isn't answering my calls or emails. I've been waiting for over a year for them to finish my marriage petition. The last time I spoke to her, she told me everything would be ready in three days. It's been two weeks now... it's always the same. I need them to be serious and take my case seriously. They're playing with my time and legal status in this country.
I complained about the Instagram comments and they blocked me. I'm desperate and don't know what else to do to get them to take my case.

I don’t usually write reviews, but this experience has pushed me to speak up. My husband and I have multiple cases with this firm and have paid them over $14,000. And what do we get in return? Silence. No calls, no updates, no accountability. Every time I call, a different receptionist gives me the same line “We’re trying to reach the paralegal.” Then I’m left on hold, only to be told there’s still no answer. Nothing ever gets resolved.
They’ve missed scheduled appointments without warning, and no one ever follows up. The one paralegal I did manage to speak with was rude and dismissive. It feels like once they have your money, they stop caring. We trusted them with important legal matters, and they’ve treated us like we don’t matter at all. It’s beyond frustrating!Do better.

I started my immigration journey with Alba Garcia, she is such a thoughtful person and she handles my case with all care and professionalism. I highly recommend her, and I am so glad to be on this journey with her. I feel like I am in such a good hands. Immigration processes are always stressful, but I was fortunate enough Alba took such great care of everything, including putting my mind at ease during time of uncertainty.  Thank you so much.

If I could give zero stars, I would. Unfortunately, I made the decision to choose this firm as my legal representatives (which they still are). After paying a lot of money for them to be our lawyers and fulfilling the terms of the contract, I completely regret it. I have to chase them down to get them to call me back with questions about my case and for advice (my current advisor never answers). Furthermore, they charged me an absurd amount extra for "future permit renewal fees," which they pretend not to know about and claim wasn't the case (and I have proof with the payment history). They literally took money right in front of me. I had to speak with attorney Sanabria, and even then, they didn't resolve anything. I had to go without my papers for a while (I tried to contact them long before they expired), waiting for a response from them, for them to call me back, and they never did. For the past three years, I've had countless advisors on my case, and ALL OF THEM are rude and unprofessional! And there are so many things to say that I wouldn't have enough space here. So it's best to get some good advice before entering here.

Terrible experience. I DO NOT RECOMMEND this law firm.

From the very beginning, the legal advice was inadequate and unprofessional. There was never any real follow-up on my case; I was always the one who had to insist to get any response, and most of the time they didn't answer my calls, emails, or messages, not even when I went to the office in person.

On one of those visits, I found out, by chance, that my lawyer and the assigned paralegal no longer worked at the firm, and no one knew anything about the status of my case. The disorganization is complete.

To make matters worse, they sent my documents after the established deadlines, which directly affected the progress of my case and seriously harmed me.

Unfortunately, all I found here was a lack of professionalism, disinterest, and a complete lack of responsibility. I would never hire their services again, and I definitely DO NOT recommend them.

It's all awful. It's really not worth hiring these people. I don't know why they have so many high ratings. Based on my experience, I wouldn't even give them one star. Communication with the staff is impossible, both by email and especially by phone. Only the sales and payments departments respond 😤. They don't take care of your case. If I hadn't been keeping an eye on it, I probably would have been deported. They charge a lot for a very low-quality service that's far from professional. I've been trying to contact them for over a week to resolve an urgent matter, and it's impossible to get them to reply to an email or return your call. This is just a brief summary of some of the experiences I've had with this "lawyer" firm 😒😒

I've been trying to contact the office for over three months and still haven't received a response! A long time ago, when I finally managed to get through to them the first time, they told me they had changed the person handling my case. They scheduled an appointment for the new person to contact me, but they never did. Two days ago, after months of trying, I finally managed to get through to the office again. They scheduled another appointment for me today at 10:00 AM, it's 11:00 AM and still nothing! This is irresponsible and shows a complete lack of professionalism on the part of the entire office. I made all my payments on time, I paid my entire contract, and they don't answer or contact me! They're quick to call when it comes to collecting payments! I need my money back!

Update: In 2021 they did excellent work. Now I can't recommend them. The customer service is very bad; they're not friendly and respond poorly. It's VERY difficult to contact them if you already have a case with them. The last few times I've spoken with lawyers, they've been VERY friendly, but I just spoke with the paralegal, Maria Elena. With an appointment scheduled for 11:00 AM, she called me at 1:30 PM. She didn't know what I needed and ended up hanging up on me after she started yelling at me and saying I had to pay for a consultation to find out the price of a legal process (by the way, I already had all the information about the case; I just needed the price). I imagine the lawyers are still good, but I don't recommend them solely because of the customer service.

---------------- Very happy with the service from Sanabria & Associates. We always receive support with timely responses to all our inquiries. They are very friendly, explain everything very well, are patient, and are a great team. Specifically, Margarito and our lawyer Vanessa, who accompanied us every step of the way in our immigration process and were key to its positive outcome! I highly recommend them!

I've been trying to contact the lawyer and paralegal for three weeks now, and nothing. I hired them in November for a motion, and to this day I haven't received any response. They're great at charging fees!

I had a very disappointing experience with this law firm. During the three years my immigration process lasted, I was assigned multiple lawyers and paralegals, with no continuity or real follow-up. Communication was always difficult, and I felt my case wasn't being handled with the seriousness it deserved.

I had my final hearing in April, and to my surprise, when I contacted them on May 21st to inquire about the judge's decision because I hadn't received any information, they told me the lawyer had forgotten to inform me of the outcome, and that I was already on the last day of the appeal period. This could have had serious consequences for my case.

Furthermore, I paid for the renewal of my work permit on February 8th. Despite several inquiries, they always told me that "everything was fine." However, on May 21st, they informed me that the application hadn't even been submitted and that they were only just assigning me a new paralegal. They only had the forms ready for a lawyer to review.

I believe the service they offer doesn't justify the price they charge. Unfortunately, this firm seems to have a more business-oriented than human approach. The only thing that functions efficiently is the collections department.

I would not recommend this firm. Immigration processes require accountability, clarity, and consistent follow-up, and that's exactly what was lacking here.

How disrespectful to say I'm lying. Here's the confirmation that I am real. And they're threatening to sue me for saying something that's true. Wow, what a level of behavior. It's sad that they take things so lightly. My annoyance is the wasted time. But oh well. What they wrote in response has nothing to do with it; they never notified me that it cost anything. On the contrary, it was FREE. But don't worry. Thanks for nothing.

For future clients, don't even think about working with these people. They charged me $8,000 to file a political asylum claim. After I paid, it's impossible to speak with your lawyer; they never answer the phone. But when it comes to making a payment, they answer immediately. If you want to waste time and money, they're the ones to go for.

They NEVER answer emails or calls, communication is impossible, you practically have to beg for them to take your case into account when you are paying for their services, which come accompanied with a contract that promises consistency in communication and follow-up of cases. As if that were not enough, just today I received a bill for a service that was canceled in February and no one responds. They play with the need and anguish of those of us who are in a vulnerable situation in this country.

Do not use their services if you don't want to waste your money and time. I paid for all services on time to submit an asylum application, and I was just a week away from completing a year's waiting period, and they hadn't done anything. Their customer service is the absolute worst; it's a complete disappointment.

Terrible service. I came here on a friend's recommendation, and it was the worst decision I could have made. You only see the lawyer on the day of the free consultation, which is practically just to tell you the price of the procedure. After that, you never see him again. If you have any questions, you have to write to an email address that they never answer, and don't even try calling because they never pick up. They only respond to positive reviews, and the few low-rated ones they do reply to seem like they were written by a teenager. This doesn't seem like a serious firm. The only reason I'm still with them is because I've already paid a lot of money.

Mediocre service from the lawyer who says he's "only here to win cases." I just received a cliché from his Instagram posts.
Don't waste your time. There's no such thing as a free consultation because they don't explain anything at all. They just ask you to give me money without explaining how they're going to handle your case.
It's preferable to assign a price for the consultation and provide responsible and concrete guidance.
They don't inspire any kind of trust to start an immigration process.
Poor service from the lawyer. It was a real waste of my time to attend that appointment.
I do not recommend it

I found Attorney Sicuso to be extremely knowledgeable, and helpful in his practice of law. I highly recommend him to anyone who needs assistance with accident law or insurance law issues. I can’t say enough, good things about him and his office!
I am very grateful for the work of Mr. Salvatore and his team, who are always attentive to every detail of the case. Thank you all for your professionalism; I recommend them 100%.

He's a very competent lawyer. From the moment you hire him, he's focused on your case, always looking out for your best interests. He always accompanies you until the end. He explains everything you need to know and helps you every step of the way. In addition to his kindness and his great effort to do things right, he has a great deal of experience in these types of cases. That has been my experience with Sicuso.

He's a very competent lawyer. From the moment you hire him, he's focused on your case, always looking out for your best interest. He always accompanies you until the end. He explains everything you need to know and helps you every step of the way. In addition to his kindness and his great effort to do things right, he also has extensive experience in these types of cases. That has been my experience with the lawyer.
Attorney Sicuso, is the real-deal. He's an honest, direct, straight shooter and a true man of integrity. I will definitely be recommending him!.

I can’t thank Salvatore Sicuso and his team enough for everything they’ve done for me. Since the very beginning, they were not only professional and knowledgeable, but also incredibly compassionate about my situation.

I was accused of a crime I did not commit.  A 1st degree felony with a maximum sentence of 30yrs!  I always kinda thought that this charge would somehow go away but it never did.  It only got more and more serious as time went on.  Literally, no-one wanted to hear my story until I met Attorney Lett.  He not only believed that I should not of been charged with a 1st degree felony, he actually began to build a coherent strategy to fight it.  On the day of trial, the prosecutor was still committed to prosecute my case and send me to prison for a long time.  Attorney Lett kept his cool and kept going forward with his strategy to intelligently show the jury that I was not guilty.  After the jury was paneled and after our opening statements, the next day, the prosecutor agreed to lower my charge to a misdemeanor, adjudication withheld, with 1 year probation suspended after 6 months!  Needless to say, everyones jaw dropped including the judge as I went from a 1st degree felony facing 30 years to a simple misdemeanor.  I would encourage anyone who is up very serious charges and want an honest answer and a listening ear to call Ariel Lett.  You will not be disappointed Im sure.

reviews.text:
A year ago my siblings and I became unexpectedly responsible for the care of our brother who had just received a diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease. Upon hearing this stunning news we began seeking services.  It soon became clear that we would need the help of an elder care specialist.

After interviewing several attorneys, the team at Mt. Sinai's Wien Center referred me to Linde Legal. From the very first conversation with Steven I knew that without a doubt we had found the expert to guide us through the complex world of trusts and Medicaid application approval.  For close to a year, Steven Linde has worked like a warrior for my brother and my family. He is incredibly knowledgeable and has a comprehensive command of the intricacies of elder law, but it is his genuine goodness that has made all the difference. Move than anything, I came to value his kindness and compassion. He is gracious, generous in spirit and with his time, and a truly honorable man. Because of Steven's dedication and relentless work, our brother is receiving the care he needs and we have peace of mind in knowing this. We will forever be grateful for his professional and personal investment in our case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Marla, thank you. That really means a lot. To see a family as committed as yours motivates me to go the extra mile for your brother.  Your dedication and advocacy  is the definition of being a  caregiver. Wishing you all a happy and healthy new year.

reviews.text: Customer Service? Nil and none, I called because my aunt is suffering,  was placed in a nursing home by mistake, need counsel to get her out, he answer the phone very rudely, made me sent him the power of attorney never from him again. Wouldn't recommend him to my dog! Horrible, rude person! 😱
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. I’m sorry to hear that your experience was not what you had hoped for.

As an attorney governed by the Florida Bar's ethical rules I am limited in my reply to your public reviews. Per my own practice, I confirm that anyone inquiring about another person’s legal matter has proper authority before I can discuss details or consider offering any representation.

To summarize my recollection of our interaction, I picked up an inquiry call you made to my office and spoke to you immediately seeing how I could possibly be of assistance. I did not provide you or your aunt any legal advice, I was never formally engaged, and no attorney-client relationship was established between us. Our communication was limited to that brief call and an email exchange, and receipt of a non-accessible link to what may have been a document you referenced over a month ago. Communication ended there.

I strive to treat all inquiries with professionalism and empathy - especially in sensitive family situations like the one you describe. I take all feedback seriously, and I am continually working to ensure every interaction reflects my high standard of service. I’m proud of the many reviews (60+ 5-star reviews) from clients I’ve had the privilege to assist. While I welcome constructive feedback, I do wish you would have reached out again so I could have addressed your concerns directly rather than airing our brief interaction online and becoming one of your reviews online.

I sincerely wish you and your aunt strength during this difficult time and I hope you’ve found the right support and counsel for your matter.

reviews.text:
My brothers and I placed our mother in the nursing home, the social workers at the nursing home are great professionals dedicated to help the patient’s family, diligently applied to Medicaid on my mother’s behalf. I am not disclosing the names of the social workers to protect them. Medicaid denied our case twice with a generic reason. The social workers requested DCF to elaborate but unsuccessful.  I also emailed the DCF representative, they never responded. The social worker referred me to Steven Linde, Esq. Thank you for referring us to Steven Linde,Esq.
I reached out to Steven Linde, Esq. I explained we had two denials, but couldn’t get responses to cure whatever the DCF was referring to. Steven immediately, without an attorney agreement contacted the social worker to get better informed of the case and then he contacted DCF. After a few days talking back and forth with Steven we signed his agreement. Within two weeks Steven got our family the Medicaid approval for my mother.
In my experience with attorneys’, when an attorney with passion works for you, the client receives better results. I say Passion is the key for better results to the client. Steven is a passionate attorney that measures success by helping the client’s needs first, second to his fees. We are very pleased with his services and his fee. It is very hard to find passion in many professionals today.
I will recommend Steven anytime for Elder Law.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Oscar. So glad to have played a small role in helping your mother get the benefits she desperately needed. All my best!
