reviews.text: Grateful for the support we received from this Law Farm. The process was smooth and easy thanks to their support. Thank you
5 star service, very professional and very knowledgeable, highly recommended.

Correa & Martinez Trial Lawyers truly stand out. Their dedication to the Miami community is evident from the moment you walk through the door. Andres Correa handles personal injury cases with unmatched professionalism, compassion, and determination. His deep knowledge of the law and commitment to justice gives his clients confidence every step of the way. This is not just a law firm—they are advocates who genuinely care. I am grateful for their hard work and highly recommend them to anyone seeking exceptional legal representation.
Correa and Martinez Trial Lawyers represented me and I honestly could not be happier with them and the positive outcome. I would definitely recommend them 100% to anyone that needs representation!
Outstanding firm. They were caring, responsive, and guided me through every step. Couldn’t have asked for better representation. Thank you, Andres.

We had a very positive experience with Correa & Martinez, working with Andres Correa on three separate insurance cases in which the insurance companies had declined all three of our claims. They helped us navigate the process every step of the way and got us paid on all three cases. We highly recommend their services. Their knowledge and expertise, coupled with excellent service, are a stand-out!
Amazing firm! Very responsive, effective, and they make you feel part of the family.

I strongly recommend Correa & Martinez Trial Lawyers. I had the privilege of working with them as co-counsel on one of my matters, and their team played a decisive role in securing an outstanding result for our mutual client. From the outset they demonstrated the qualities you want in a true trial team: thoughtful strategy, meticulous preparation, clear communication, and an unwavering focus on the client’s best interests.

What impressed me most was their trial acumen and practical judgment. They helped craft persuasive arguments, anticipated the opposing side’s tactics, and delivered in court with confidence and professionalism. Their commitment to the client was obvious — they were responsive at every turn, handled discovery and motion practice efficiently, and were always willing to coordinate closely so our teams presented a unified, effective approach.

Beyond technical skill, Correa & Martinez brought excellent client advocacy and courtroom presence. They balanced tenacity with civility, never losing sight of the client’s goals while maintaining the highest ethical standards. Their responsiveness (including availability around the clock) and attention to detail made the collaboration smooth and effective.

If you’re looking for co-counsel or trial counsel who combine strategic thinking, solid litigation skills, and genuine client care, Correa & Martinez are an excellent choice.

Very professional staff and team of lawyers.  In a city saturated with attorneys, it’s difficult to standout and be part of an elite group of litigators that’s well above the rest. Correa & Martinez have achieved such coveted exceptional status through their unwavering professionalism, respect, empathy, and attention to detail.  I highly recommend their entire team with utmost confidence.

I couldn’t be more impressed with Correa & Martinez Trial Lawyers. From the very first consultation, their team demonstrated a level of professionalism, expertise, and genuine compassion that immediately put me at ease. They took the time to understand every detail of my case, explained the legal process clearly, and always made sure I knew what to expect at each step.

I could not be happier with the professionalism and representation I received from Mr. Correa. The attention to making sure I was properly advised and prepared for my proceeding was impeccable. My calls were promptly returned and my questions were always answered.  I’m happy to have found a skilled and trustworthy attorney to help me when I needed it the most.
Excellent professionalism and dedication in each process. They always attended to my case in the best way.
All worked perfectly
Everyone in the office is very helpful and attentive. They were on top of my needs and helped  along each step of the way. Mr. Martinez was accessible to answer any questions I had.

Hiring an attorney can be stressful and challenging. Throughout the years , when I have needed legal assistance, Correa and Martinez have represented me with successful outcomes and always  with my best interest in mind. Their experience and expertise is evident with  the satisfactory outcomes obtained on cases involving a personal injury as well as a homeowner’s property claim .
I was always kept informed and given detailed explanations as to the process and never felt ignored. When I hired Correa and Martinez , I felt confident in my decision and with no regrets . I am usually not a person to recommend companies for fear of the recommendation not meeting expectations but I would not hesitate to recommend Correa and Martinez for your legal needs .
Correa and Martinez is a professional, knowledgeable, and conscientious law firm.

I had a great experience with the Law Offices of Kirshner Groff & Diaz. Jonathan H. Groff was professional, responsive, and made the entire process feel much less stressful than I expected.

Jonathan was incredibly knowledgeable and took the time to explain everything clearly. He was patient with my questions and always made sure I understood my options before making any decisions. That level of communication and care really stood out.

If you’re looking for a law firm that is professional, reliable, and truly attentive to their clients, I would absolutely recommend Jonathan H. Groff at the Law Offices of Kirshner Groff & Diaz.

At Law Offices of Kirshner Groff & Diaz, we’re committed to delivering dedicated support to anyone looking for a trusted Miami personal injury attorney. We truly appreciate your trust in our firm.

reviews.text:
I have worked with attorney Richard Kirshner since the 1980s, and after decades of experience, I can say without hesitation that this is the definition of a perfect lawyer.

Throughout the years, I have consistently received the highest level of professionalism, honesty, and dedication. Communication has always been exceptional — calls are returned promptly, questions are answered thoroughly, and I have never felt ignored or rushed. No matter the situation, I always felt that my case truly mattered.

What sets this attorney apart is not only legal expertise, but the way clients are treated — like family. There is a rare balance of professionalism and genuine care that is difficult to find today. I have always felt protected, respected, and confident knowing my legal matters were in the right hands.

Longevity speaks volumes, and my continued trust since the 1980s says everything. I would recommend this attorney without reservation to anyone seeking reliable, responsive, and exceptional legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text:
I cannot speak highly enough of Attorney Angel Diaz and the entire team at Kirschner, Groff & Diaz. From the very beginning, Angel Diaz stood out—not just as a sharp and seasoned personal injury attorney, but as someone who genuinely cares. Unlike most firms where the attorney is involved in the intake and then vanishes, Angel Diaz remained consistently available throughout my entire case. He gave me his personal cell number—the same number his family uses—and made himself available day or night, including weekends. Every time I had a question, he picked up or called right back, and I never felt rushed, even during off hours.

Angel speaks fluent Spanish, which made communication even more reassuring for my family. He took the time to explain every step of the process and always made me feel heard. I never once felt like “just another case.”

His firm runs like a well-oiled machine when it comes to personal injury and vehicular accident cases. The staff is professional, responsive, and truly committed to resolving matters efficiently. What impressed me most was how they handled everything with both urgency and compassion.

I was hesitant to pursue a lawsuit because I’ve never been the “suing type.” But Angel Diaz gave me confidence, explained my rights in a way that empowered me, and helped me realize I deserved to be treated fairly and with dignity.

If you want an attorney who won’t disappear after you sign up—who will treat you like a real person and fight for you every step of the way—Angel Diaz is that rare find. I’m deeply grateful to him and his team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your heartfelt review, Giselle! At Law Offices of Kirshner Groff & Diaz, we are proud to have Attorney Angel Diaz and our dedicated team providing compassionate and attentive service as your trusted Miami car accident attorney. We believe every client deserves personalized care, clear communication, and unwavering support throughout their case. Your kind words inspire us to continue delivering the highest level of commitment and professionalism. We're truly grateful for your trust and are here for you every step of the way.
